title: gohai
description: Canonical schema for gohai host inventory output. Describes the full Facts structure returned by gohai.New().Collect(), covering system identity, hardware, network, cloud provider metadata, virtualization, security, software, users, and miscellaneous host facts.

gohai_version.description: Version of the gohai binary or library that produced this output.

collected_at.description: Unix epoch timestamp when collection completed (seconds).

collect_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the collection run completed.

collect_duration_ns.description: Total wall-clock duration of the collection run (nanoseconds).

Alibaba.description: Alibaba Cloud ECS instance metadata from the IMDS at 100.100.100.200.

instance_name.description: Instance display name set by the user.

owner_account_id.description: Alibaba Cloud account identifier that owns this instance.

source_address.description: Package repository source address for the region.

spot_termination_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when a spot instance will be terminated. Empty for non-spot instances.

mac.description: Primary ENI MAC address in colon-separated hex.

dns_nameservers.description: DNS nameserver addresses configured for the instance.

ntp_servers.description: NTP server addresses configured for the instance.

network_interfaces.description: Elastic network interfaces keyed by MAC address.

ram_role_name.description: RAM role name attached to the instance for API access.

disks.description: Attached disks keyed by serial number.

tags.description: User-defined instance tags as key-value pairs.

public_ip.description: Elastic public IPv4 address, if attached.

AlibabaDisk.description: One Alibaba Cloud ECS disk attachment.

AlibabaNetworkInterface.description: One Alibaba Cloud elastic network interface.

primary_ip_address.description: Primary private IPv4 address on this ENI.

private_ipv4s.description: All private IPv4 addresses assigned to this ENI.

ipv4_prefixes.description: Delegated IPv4 prefix ranges on this ENI.

gateway.description: Default gateway address for this ENI.

vpc_id.description: VPC identifier this ENI belongs to.

vswitch_id.description: VSwitch identifier this ENI is attached to.

ipv6s.description: IPv6 addresses assigned to this ENI.

ipv6_prefixes.description: Delegated IPv6 prefix ranges on this ENI.

ipv6_gateway.description: IPv6 gateway address for this ENI.

Azure.description: Azure VM instance metadata from the IMDS at 169.254.169.254.

resource_id.description: Fully qualified Azure resource identifier path.

vm_scale_set_name.description: VM Scale Set name. Empty for standalone VMs.

eviction_policy.description: Spot VM eviction policy: "Deallocate" or "Delete". Empty for regular VMs.

zone.description: Availability zone number within the region.

platform_fault_domain.description: Fault domain index for the VM.

platform_update_domain.description: Update domain index for the VM.

license_type.description: License type for Azure Hybrid Benefit (e.g. "Windows_Server").

is_host_compatibility_layer_vm.description: True when running inside Azure's host compatibility layer.

public_keys.description: SSH public keys provisioned on the VM.

interfaces.description: Network interfaces keyed by MAC address.

public_ipv4.description: All public IPv4 addresses across all network interfaces.

public_ipv6.description: All public IPv6 addresses across all network interfaces.

local_ipv6.description: All private IPv6 addresses across all network interfaces.

local_ipv4.description: All private IPv4 addresses across all network interfaces.

AzureAdditionalCapabilities.description: Additional VM capabilities such as hibernation support.

AzureDisk.description: One Azure managed disk (OS or data).

write_accelerator_enabled.description: Whether write accelerator is enabled: "true" or "false".

lun.description: Logical unit number. Present for data disks only.

AzureExtendedLocation.description: Non-standard Azure placement such as edge zones or Azure Arc.

AzureHost.description: Azure Dedicated Host assignment for isolated single-tenant placement.

AzureHostGroup.description: Azure Dedicated Host Group for managing a collection of dedicated hosts.

AzureIPAddress.description: One IP address assignment on an Azure network interface.

public_ip.description: Public IP address. Empty when no public IP is assigned.

AzureIPAddrs.description: IP address and subnet information for one address family on an Azure interface.

ip_addresses.description: IP address assignments (private and optional public).

subnets.description: Subnet address ranges associated with this interface.

AzureInterface.description: One Azure network interface with IPv4 and IPv6 address details.

AzureManagedDisk.description: Azure managed disk reference and storage tier.

AzureOSProfile.description: OS provisioning settings from the Azure VM profile.

disable_password_authentication.description: Whether password authentication is disabled: "true" or "false".

AzurePlan.description: Azure Marketplace plan metadata for third-party images.

AzurePublicKey.description: One SSH public key provisioned on the Azure VM.

key_data.description: SSH public key data in OpenSSH format.

path.description: Filesystem path where the key is deployed (e.g. "/home/azureuser/.ssh/authorized_keys").

AzureSecurityProfile.description: Azure VM security settings for Trusted Launch and confidential computing.

secure_boot_enabled.description: Whether UEFI Secure Boot is enabled: "true" or "false".

virtual_tpm_enabled.description: Whether virtual TPM is enabled: "true" or "false".

encryption_at_host.description: Whether encryption at host is enabled: "true" or "false".

AzureStorageProfile.description: VM storage layout including OS disk and data disks.

AzureSubnet.description: Subnet address range on an Azure network interface.

AzureTag.description: One Azure resource tag as a structured name-value pair.

BtrfsAllocation.description: Allocation and usage for one btrfs block-group type (data, metadata, or system).

total_bytes.description: Total bytes allocated for this block-group type (bytes).

BtrfsInfo.description: Btrfs-specific RAID profile and per-type allocation data. Linux only.

CPU.description: CPU topology, model identification, feature flags, cache layout, NUMA topology, and hardware vulnerability mitigation status.

count.description: Logical CPU count visible to the OS scheduler, including hyperthreads.

sockets.description: Number of physical CPU packages installed.

cores.description: Total physical core count across all sockets.

model_name.description: Human-readable CPU model string (e.g. "Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-10700K", "Apple M1 Pro").

family.description: CPU family number from CPUID. Platform-dependent string representation.

model.description: CPU model number within the family from CPUID.

stepping.description: CPU stepping/revision within the model, identifying the silicon errata level.

cache_size.description: Aggregate last-level cache size reported by the OS (KB).

caches.description: Per-level cache sizes. Linux only, from lscpu.

numa_nodes.description: NUMA topology mapping node ID (as string key) to CPU indices assigned to that node. Linux only.

numa_node_count.description: Total number of NUMA nodes. Linux only.

vulnerabilities.description: CPU hardware vulnerability name to kernel mitigation status. Linux only.

cpus_online.description: Number of CPUs currently online. Linux only.

cpus_offline.description: Number of CPUs currently offline. Linux only.

bios_vendor_id.description: BIOS-reported CPU vendor identifier. Linux only.

bios_model_name.description: BIOS-reported CPU model name. Linux only.

machine_type.description: Machine type identifier, primarily for s390x mainframes. Linux only.

mhz_dynamic.description: Dynamic CPU frequency for s390x mainframes (MHz). Linux only.

op_modes.description: Supported CPU operation modes (e.g. ["32-bit", "64-bit"]). Linux only.

byte_order.description: CPU byte order: "little endian" or "big endian". Linux only.

address_sizes.description: Physical and virtual address sizes (e.g. ["48 bits physical", "48 bits virtual"]). Linux only.

virtualization_type.description: Virtualization type when running as a guest (e.g. "full", "para"). Linux only.

dispatching_mode.description: CPU dispatching mode for s390x mainframes. Linux only.

cpus.description: Per-logical-CPU details. One entry per processor, relevant on hybrid-core architectures.

CPUCaches.description: Per-level CPU cache sizes. Values are human-readable strings (e.g. "32 KiB", "1 MiB").

l1d.description: L1 data cache size per core.

l1i.description: L1 instruction cache size per core.

l2d.description: L2 data cache size. Rare, present on some ARM processors.

l2i.description: L2 instruction cache size. Rare, present on some ARM processors.

l4.description: L4 cache size. Rare, present on some Intel Broadwell models with eDRAM.

CPUEntry.description: Identity and topology placement for one logical CPU.

vendor_id.description: CPU vendor identifier for this logical CPU.

family.description: CPU family number for this logical CPU.

model.description: CPU model number for this logical CPU.

model_name.description: Human-readable model name for this logical CPU.

stepping.description: Silicon stepping/revision for this logical CPU.

physical_id.description: Socket index this logical CPU belongs to.

core_id.description: Physical core index within the socket.

cores.description: Total core count on this CPU's socket.

mhz.description: Current clock speed of this logical CPU (MHz).

cache_size.description: Cache size for this logical CPU (KB).

flags.description: CPU feature flags for this logical CPU.

CollectorTiming.description: Timing and status for a single collector's run.

duration_ns.description: Wall-clock duration of this collector's run (nanoseconds).

status.description: Run outcome: "ok" for success, "err" for failure.

error.description: Error message when the collector failed. Absent on success.

DMI.description: SMBIOS/DMI data covering BIOS, baseboard, chassis, and system product identity.

DMIBIOS.description: Firmware identity from DMI type 0 (BIOS Information).

vendor.description: BIOS vendor name (e.g. "American Megatrends Inc.", "Amazon EC2").

DMIBaseboard.description: Motherboard identity from DMI type 2 (Base Board Information).

DMIChassis.description: Enclosure identity from DMI type 3 (System Enclosure).

type.description: Chassis type code (e.g. "1" for Other, "3" for Desktop).

DMIProduct.description: System identity from DMI type 1 (System Information). Cloud collectors use product name for provider detection.

name.description: System product name (e.g. "Google Compute Engine", "Amazon EC2", "VirtualBox").

DigitalOcean.description: DigitalOcean droplet metadata from the metadata API.

public_keys.description: SSH public keys in OpenSSH format.

floating_ip.description: Legacy floating IPv4 address. Deprecated in favor of reserved_ip.

auth_key.description: Internal authentication token for DigitalOcean services.

interfaces.description: Network interfaces including public and private.

ipv4.description: IPv4 address assigned to this interface.

ipv4_gateway.description: IPv4 default gateway for this interface.

ipv6.description: IPv6 address assigned to this interface.

ipv6_gateway.description: IPv6 default gateway for this interface.

anchor_ipv4.description: Anchor IPv4 used for floating/reserved IP routing.

DirectMap.description: Physical memory coverage by page-table mapping granularity. Linux only.

map_4k.description: Physical memory mapped with 4 KB pages (bytes).

map_2m.description: Physical memory mapped with 2 MB huge pages (bytes).

map_1g.description: Physical memory mapped with 1 GB huge pages (bytes).

Disk.description: Block device I/O counters for all detected disks.

devices.description: Block devices with their cumulative I/O statistics.

DiskDevice.description: Cumulative I/O counters for one block device.

read_count.description: Total completed read operations since boot.

write_count.description: Total completed write operations since boot.

read_time.description: Total time spent on read operations since boot (milliseconds). Linux only.

write_time.description: Total time spent on write operations since boot (milliseconds). Linux only.

io_time.description: Total weighted time spent doing I/O since boot (milliseconds). Linux only.

EC2.description: AWS EC2 instance metadata from IMDS (IMDSv2 preferred, IMDSv1 fallback).

ami_id.description: AMI identifier the instance was launched from.

ami_launch_index.description: Launch index when multiple instances were started from the same request.

ami_manifest_path.description: S3 path to the AMI manifest. Present for instance-store-backed AMIs only.

public_hostname.description: Public DNS hostname. Empty when no public IP is assigned.

local_ipv4s.description: All private IPv4 addresses across all ENIs.

security_groups.description: Security group names attached to the primary ENI.

network_interfaces.description: Per-ENI metadata keyed by MAC address.

availability_zone_id.description: Availability zone identifier, consistent across accounts (e.g. "use1-az1").

group_name.description: Placement group name. Empty when not in a placement group.

host_id.description: Dedicated Host identifier. Empty for shared tenancy.

partition_number.description: Partition number within a partition placement group.

kernel_id.description: AKI identifier. Present for legacy paravirtual instances only.

ramdisk_id.description: ARI identifier. Present for legacy paravirtual instances only.

spot_termination_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of scheduled spot termination. Empty for non-spot instances.

services_domain.description: AWS services domain for the partition (e.g. "amazonaws.com", "amazonaws.com.cn").

product_codes.description: AWS Marketplace product codes associated with the AMI.

public_keys.description: SSH public keys in OpenSSH format.

block_device_mapping.description: Virtual disk name to device path mapping (e.g. {"ami": "/dev/sda1", "root": "/dev/sda1"}).

api_version.description: IMDS API version used for this collection.

user_data.description: Raw user-data content. Base64-encoded when binary, plaintext when UTF-8.

public_ip.description: Primary public IPv4 address. Empty when no public IP is assigned.

EC2IAMInfo.description: IAM instance profile metadata. Credentials are excluded.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last credential refresh.

EC2NetworkInterface.description: Metadata for one EC2 elastic network interface (ENI).

local_hostname.description: Internal DNS hostname for this ENI.

local_ipv4s.description: Private IPv4 addresses assigned to this ENI.

mac.description: ENI MAC address in colon-separated hex.

network_card_index.description: Network card index for multi-card instances.

owner_id.description: AWS account identifier that owns this ENI.

public_hostname.description: Public DNS hostname for this ENI.

public_ipv4s.description: Public and Elastic IP addresses on this ENI.

security_group_ids.description: Security group identifiers attached to this ENI.

security_groups.description: Security group names attached to this ENI.

ipv6s.description: IPv6 addresses assigned to this ENI.

FIPS.description: FIPS 140-2/140-3 compliance mode detection at the kernel and user-space policy levels.

enabled.description: True when the kernel booted with fips=1 (FIPS 140-2 mode active).

fips_effective.description: True when the active policy enforces FIPS 140-3 compliant cryptography.

Filesystem.description: Mounted and unmounted filesystems with capacity, usage, inode counters, and ZFS datasets.

mounts.description: Active mount table entries with capacity and usage details.

unmounted.description: Block devices with a recognized filesystem but no active mountpoint. Linux only.

zfs_datasets.description: ZFS datasets with full property sets. Present when the zfs binary is on PATH. Linux only.

FilesystemMount.description: One mounted filesystem with capacity, usage, and inode counters.

FilesystemUnmounted.description: Block device with a recognized filesystem that is not currently mounted.

GCE.description: Google Compute Engine instance metadata from the GCE metadata server.

description.description: Instance description set by the user.

tags.description: Network tags applied to the instance.

preemptible.description: True when this is a preemptible (Spot) instance.

automatic_restart.description: Whether the instance restarts automatically on host failures: "TRUE" or "FALSE".

licenses.description: GCP license identifiers attached to the instance.

attributes.description: Instance-level metadata key-value pairs (e.g. SSH keys, startup scripts).

service_accounts.description: GCP service accounts attached to the instance.

virtual_clock_drift_token.description: Opaque token for detecting VM live migration via virtual clock drift.

remaining_cpu_time.description: Seconds of CPU time remaining before preemption. -1 on non-preemptible instances (seconds).

partner_attributes.description: Key-value pairs set by GCE partner images.

GCEAccessConfig.description: External access configuration (public IP and NAT type) on a GCE NIC.

device_name.description: Disk device name as seen by the guest OS.

index.description: Disk index. 0 indicates the boot disk.

encrypted.description: True when the disk is encrypted with a customer-managed key.

gateway.description: Default gateway IPv4 address for this NIC.

dns_servers.description: DNS server addresses configured for this NIC.

ip_aliases.description: Alias IP ranges assigned to this NIC.

forwarded_ips.description: Forwarded (load balancer) IP addresses routed to this NIC.

target_instance_ips.description: Target instance IP addresses for this NIC.

mtu.description: Maximum transmission unit configured on this NIC (bytes).

GCEServiceAccount.description: One GCP service account attached to the instance.

key.description: Service account key identifier (usually "default" or the SA email).

scopes.description: OAuth scopes granted to this service account.

cards.description: Detected GPU devices. Empty on headless servers or containers without /sys/class/drm.

GPUCard.description: One GPU or graphics accelerator device.

vendor.description: GPU vendor name (e.g. "Apple", "NVIDIA Corporation", "Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.").

model.description: GPU model name (e.g. "Apple M1 Pro", "GP107 [GeForce GTX 1050 Ti]").

address.description: PCI bus address on Linux, bus descriptor on macOS.

vendor_id.description: PCI vendor identifier in hex (e.g. "10de"). Linux only.

device_id.description: PCI device identifier in hex. Linux only.

cores.description: GPU core count. macOS integrated Apple GPUs only.

members.description: Usernames that belong to this group.

Hardware.description: macOS-specific hardware facts from system_profiler. Empty on Linux.

cpu_type.description: CPU type string. Present on Intel Macs only.

chip_type.description: Chip type string (e.g. "Apple M1 Pro"). Present on Apple Silicon Macs only.

current_processor_speed.description: Processor speed string. Present on Intel Macs only.

number_processors.description: Number of processors or cores as reported by system_profiler.

fully_charged.description: True when the battery is fully charged.

is_charging.description: True when the battery is currently charging.

amperage.description: Current draw or charge rate (mA). Negative when discharging.

HardwareCharger.description: macOS AC charger information from SPPowerDataType.

connected.description: True when the charger is currently connected.

HardwareStorage.description: One macOS storage volume from SPStorageDataType.

writable.description: True when the volume is writable.

partitions.description: Number of partitions on the underlying physical disk.

Hostname.description: Host naming: short hostname, FQDN via DNS canonicalization, domain portion, and raw machine name.

machine_name.description: Raw hostname output. On macOS this is the ComputerName-derived friendly name.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name via forward+reverse DNS (e.g. "web01.example.com").

domain.description: Domain portion of the FQDN (e.g. "example.com"). Empty when DNS canonicalization fails.

Hugepages.description: Hugepage configuration and usage. Linux only.

total.description: Total number of persistent hugepages configured.

reserved.description: Hugepages reserved for committed allocations but not yet faulted.

surplus.description: Surplus hugepages allocated above the persistent pool.

anon_hugepages.description: Transparent hugepage memory currently in use (bytes).

hugetlb.description: Total hugepage memory across all page sizes (bytes).

Init.description: Init system detection: identifies the process manager running as PID 1.

Kernel.description: Kernel identity from uname(2) and macOS Rosetta 2 translation state.

version.description: Kernel build string including date and compiler details.

processor.description: Processor type. Typically matches the machine field on Linux and macOS.

rosetta_translated.description: True when running under Apple Rosetta 2 translation (x86_64 binary on ARM Mac). macOS only.

KernelModule.description: One loaded kernel module (Linux) or kext (macOS).

refcount.description: Number of references currently holding this module loaded.

index.description: Kext load order index from kextstat. macOS only; zero on Linux.

KernelModules.description: Loaded kernel modules (Linux /proc/modules) or kexts (macOS kextstat).

modules.description: Module name to metadata mapping. Empty when no modules are loaded.

LSB.description: Linux Standard Base identification from lsb_release. Linux only.

Linode.description: Linode instance metadata. Detected via apt sources or domain heuristic.

Load.description: System load averages representing runnable and uninterruptible task counts over 1, 5, and 15 minute windows.

MachineID.description: Stable machine identifier that persists across reboots.

id.description: Stable host identifier from /etc/machine-id (Linux) or IOPlatformUUID (macOS). Changes on re-provisioning or OS reinstall.

Memory.description: System memory totals, usage breakdown, kernel allocations, page cache, hugepages, and swap. All size values are in bytes unless otherwise noted.

available.description: Memory available for new allocations without swapping (bytes).

free.description: Memory not used for anything (bytes). Much lower than available on Linux due to page cache.

active.description: Memory recently accessed and not easily reclaimable (bytes).

inactive.description: Memory not recently accessed, candidate for reclaim (bytes).

active_anon.description: Active anonymous memory such as process heap and stack (bytes). Linux only.

active_file.description: Active file-backed memory in page cache (bytes). Linux only.

unevictable.description: Memory locked via mlock or used by ramfs that cannot be reclaimed (bytes). Linux only.

wired.description: Memory wired down by the kernel that cannot be paged out (bytes). macOS only.

compressed.description: Memory compressed by the in-memory compressor (bytes). macOS only.

buffers.description: Memory used for block device I/O buffers (bytes). Linux only.

cached.description: Memory used by the page cache (bytes). Linux only.

dirty.description: Memory with modified data waiting to be written to disk (bytes). Linux only.

writeback.description: Memory actively being written back to disk (bytes). Linux only.

writeback_tmp.description: Memory used for FUSE writeback temporary buffers (bytes). Linux only.

shared.description: Memory used by tmpfs and shared memory segments (bytes).

mapped.description: Memory mapped into process address spaces via mmap (bytes). Linux only.

slab.description: Total kernel slab allocator memory (bytes). Linux only.

s_reclaimable.description: Reclaimable slab memory such as dentry and inode caches (bytes). Linux only.

page_tables.description: Memory consumed by page table entries (bytes). Linux only.

kernel_stack.description: Memory used for kernel thread stacks (bytes). Linux only.

percpu.description: Per-CPU kernel data structure allocations (bytes). Linux only.

high_total.description: Total high memory (bytes). 32-bit kernels with >4 GB RAM only. Linux only.

nfs_unstable.description: NFS pages sent to the server but not yet committed to storage (bytes). Linux only.

bounce.description: Memory used for block device bounce buffers (bytes). Linux only.

anon_pages.description: Anonymous pages mapped into user-space page tables (bytes). Linux only.

shmem.description: Shared memory and tmpfs usage (bytes). Linux only.

commit_limit.description: Maximum memory the kernel will commit based on overcommit settings (bytes). Linux only.

committed_as.description: Total memory committed by all process allocations (bytes). Linux only.

vmalloc_total.description: Total vmalloc address space (bytes). Linux only.

vmalloc_chunk.description: Largest contiguous free vmalloc block (bytes). Linux only.

Network.description: Network interfaces, routes, ARP/NDP neighbours, and default gateway information.

interfaces.description: All network interfaces on the host.

neighbours.description: ARP (IPv4) and NDP (IPv6) neighbour cache entries.

default_interface.description: Interface name carrying the IPv4 default route.

default_inet6_interface.description: Interface name carrying the IPv6 default route.

NetworkAddress.description: One IP address bound to a network interface.

NetworkCounters.description: Cumulative I/O counters for one network interface.

NetworkEthtool.description: Per-interface ethtool diagnostics. Linux only, Ethernet interfaces only.

driver_info.description: Driver metadata: driver name, version, firmware version, bus info, etc.

ring_params.description: Ring buffer parameters: max and current RX/TX ring sizes.

channel_params.description: Channel/queue counts: max and current combined, RX, TX queue counts.

coalesce_params.description: Interrupt coalescing parameters: rx_usecs, tx_max_coalesced_frames, adaptive settings, etc.

pause_params.description: Flow-control pause settings: autonegotiate, RX pause, TX pause.

NetworkInterface.description: One network interface with addresses, counters, driver info, and optional metadata.

mac.description: Hardware (MAC) address in colon-separated hex notation.

duplex.description: Link duplex mode: "half", "full", or "unknown". Linux only.

addresses.description: IP addresses bound to this interface.

NetworkNeighbour.description: One ARP (IPv4) or NDP (IPv6) neighbour cache entry.

mac.description: Neighbour MAC address in colon-separated hex.

interface.description: Interface through which the neighbour is reachable.

gateway.description: Next-hop gateway address. Empty for directly connected routes.

source.description: Preferred source address for this route.

proto.description: Routing protocol that installed this route (e.g. "kernel", "dhcp", "bird").

metric.description: Route metric/priority. Lower values are preferred.

NetworkTunnel.description: IP tunnel metadata from `ip -d link`. Linux only.

external.description: True for externally controlled tunnels (collect_md mode).

flowlabel.description: IPv6 flow label for tunnel packets.

addrgenmode.description: IPv6 address generation mode on the tunnel interface.

NetworkXDP.description: Attached XDP (eXpress Data Path) eBPF programs on the interface. Linux only.

attached.description: XDP programs currently attached to this interface.

OCI.description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure instance metadata from the OCI IMDS.

fault_domain.description: Fault domain within the availability domain (e.g. "FAULT-DOMAIN-1").

instance_pool_id.description: Instance pool OCID if this instance belongs to an instance pool.

dedicated_vm_host_id.description: Dedicated VM host OCID for isolated compute placement.

platform_config.description: Platform-specific configuration for the compute shape.

volume_attachments.description: Attached block volumes keyed by attachment OCID.

OCIAgentConfig.description: Oracle Cloud Agent plugin and monitoring configuration.

is_management_disabled.description: True when the management agent plugin is disabled.

are_all_plugins_disabled.description: True when all Oracle Cloud Agent plugins are disabled.

is_live_migration_preferred.description: True when live migration is preferred over reboot during maintenance.

is_consistent_volume_naming_enabled.description: True when consistent device naming is enabled for attached volumes.

is_pv_encryption_in_transit_enabled.description: True when in-transit encryption is enabled for paravirtualized volumes.

OCIRegionInfo.description: OCI region realm and key metadata.

realm_key.description: Realm key (e.g. "oc1" for commercial, "oc2" for government).

max_vnic_attachments.description: Maximum number of VNIC attachments supported.

image_id.description: Boot image OCID. Present when source_type is "image".

boot_volume_id.description: Boot volume OCID. Present when source_type is "bootVolume".

kms_key_id.description: KMS key OCID used for boot volume encryption.

OCIVNIC.description: One OCI virtual network interface card attachment.

virtual_router_ip.description: Virtual router (gateway) IP address for this VNIC's subnet.

subnet_cidr_block.description: Subnet CIDR block this VNIC belongs to.

nic_index.description: Physical NIC index on bare metal instances.

is_read_only.description: True when the volume is attached in read-only mode.

device.description: Device path as seen by the guest OS (e.g. "/dev/oracleoci/oraclevdb").

encryption_in_transit.description: True when in-transit encryption is enabled for this attachment.

id_like.description: Related OS identifiers (e.g. ["debian"] for Ubuntu, ["rhel", "fedora"] for CentOS).

pretty_name.description: Presentational OS name with version (e.g. "Ubuntu 24.04 LTS (Noble Numbat)").

extra.description: Non-standard os-release keys not explicitly parsed above.

OpenStack.description: OpenStack (Nova) instance metadata from the EC2-compatible metadata API and Nova's meta_data.json.

security_groups.description: Security group names attached to the instance.

launch_index.description: Launch index within a multi-instance request.

public_keys.description: SSH public keys keyed by key name.

path.description: Device path in the guest OS.

tags.description: Device tags set by the user.

PCI.description: PCI devices enumerated from sysfs. Linux only.

devices.description: PCI devices keyed by bus address (e.g. "0000:03:00.0").

PCIDevice.description: One PCI device with vendor, class, and driver details.

class_name.description: Resolved class name (e.g. "Ethernet controller", "VGA compatible controller").

driver.description: Kernel driver bound to this device.

iommu_group.description: IOMMU group identifier for this device.

path.description: Absolute path to the package manager binary.

gecos.description: GECOS field containing full name and optional contact info.

Platform.description: OS identification: canonical distribution name, version, family, architecture, and build identifier.

version.description: OS version string (e.g. "24.04" for Ubuntu, "14.4.1" for macOS).

version_extra.description: Supplemental version info such as macOS Rapid Security Response patches.

build.description: OS build identifier. macOS BuildVersion (e.g. "23F79"); empty on Linux.

Process.description: Snapshot of running processes at collection time.

count.description: Total number of processes in this snapshot.

ProcessEntry.description: One running process. Fields unreadable due to permissions or zombie state are left empty.

state.description: Process state: R (running), S (sleeping), D (disk sleep), Z (zombie), T (stopped), I (idle).

start_time.description: Process start time as Unix epoch (seconds).

RootGroup.description: Primary group of the root user (UID 0).

name.description: Group name for root's primary GID (e.g. "root" on Linux, "wheel" on macOS/BSD).

SCSI.description: SCSI devices from lsscsi output. Linux only.

devices.description: SCSI devices keyed by SCSI address in H:C:T:L format (e.g. "0:0:0:0").

Scaleway.description: Scaleway instance metadata from the metadata server at 169.254.42.42.

public_ip_dynamic.description: True when the public IP is dynamically assigned rather than reserved.

ssh_public_keys.description: SSH public keys in OpenSSH format.

ScalewayBootscript.description: Legacy Scaleway boot configuration (deprecated in favor of local boot).

public.description: True when the bootscript is publicly available.

export_uri.description: Volume export URI for NBD attachment.

terminal.description: Terminal device (e.g. "pts/0", "tty1"). Empty for graphical sessions.

host.description: Remote host address for SSH sessions. Empty for local sessions.

started.description: Session start time as Unix epoch (seconds). Available via utmp path only.

session_id.description: Systemd session identifier. Available via loginctl path only.

uid.description: Numeric user identifier as string. Available via loginctl path only.

seat.description: Systemd seat assignment. Available via loginctl path only.

Sessions.description: Currently logged-in user sessions from loginctl (systemd) or utmp/utmpx.

Shard.description: Deterministic shard seed derived from stable host identity via MD5 hash. Same host always maps to the same bucket.

seed.description: Shard seed integer (0 to 2^28-1). First 7 hex characters of the MD5 hash interpreted as base-16.

Shells.description: Valid login shells installed on the host, parsed from /etc/shells.

paths.description: Absolute paths to available login shells (e.g. ["/bin/bash", "/bin/zsh", "/usr/bin/fish"]).

cached.description: Swapped pages also present in RAM (bytes). Linux only.

Timings.description: Per-collector runtime observability data, present when WithTimings() is enabled.

collectors.description: Collector name to timing entry mapping.

offset.description: UTC offset (seconds). Negative for west of UTC (e.g. -28800 for PST).

Users.description: System user and group databases from /etc/passwd and /etc/group, plus the effective current user.

group.description: Group name to group entry mapping.

current_user.description: Username of the effective current user (matching the EUID).

Virtualization.description: Hypervisor and container runtime detection. A host may participate in multiple layers simultaneously.

system.description: Primary detected virtualization system (e.g. "docker", "kvm", "vmware", "lxc"). Empty on bare metal.

role.description: Role in the primary system: "host" (running VMs/containers) or "guest" (inside a VM/container). Empty on bare metal.

systems.description: All detected virtualization layers as system name to role mapping (e.g. {"kvm": "guest", "docker": "host"}).

hypervisor_host.description: Hostname of the hypervisor when detectable by the guest (e.g. via Hyper-V KVP).

ZFSDataset.description: One ZFS dataset (filesystem, volume, snapshot, or bookmark) with its property set.

mountpoint.description: Mount path. Empty for snapshots, volumes, or datasets with mountpoint=none.

is_pool.description: True when this dataset is a zpool root (no slash in the name).

parents.description: Ancestor dataset paths from shallowest to deepest.

properties.description: Full ZFS property set from `zfs get all`. Keys are property names.

ZFSProperty.description: One ZFS property value with its source annotation.
